card.name: Ajak
card.property: Seeking Truth — Response: After Ajak is attacked and takes no damage, heal damage from a friendly character equal to Ajak's THW. (Limit once per round.) "Let us find our gods together."

alternate.name: The Uni-Mind
alternate.property: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

card.name: Connection to the Uni-Mind
card.property: Permanent. Setup. This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, move all counters on your hero or cards attached to your hero to this card. Set your hero aside, out of play, and flip this card over.

card.name: Lives of Eons
card.property: Action: Choose one: • Search your deck and discard pile for an identity specific card and play it (paying all costs). (Shuffle.) • Shuffle up to 3 identity specific cards from your discard pile into your deck.

card.name: The Exclusion
card.property: Increase your ally limit by 1. Response: After your turn begins, heal 1 damage from a defeated [[ETERNAL]] ally. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust The Exclusion → heal 1 damage from an [[ETERNAL]] ally (even if they are defeated).

card.name: Guard the Machine
card.property: Attach to a non-defeated [[ETERNAL]] ally you control. Attached ally loses the immortal keyword and gets +1 ATK, THW, and hit point. Response: After Guard the Machine enters play, heal all damage from attached ally. Forced Interrupt: When attached ally would be defeated, discard this card.

card.name: Skills of the Ancients
card.property: Each [[ETERNAL]] character you control gains the [[AERIAL]] and [[PSIONIC]] traits. Hero Action: Exhaust Skills of the Ancients → give an [[ETERNAL]] ally you control +1 ATK or +1 THW until the end of the round.

card.name: Puppet Master
card.property: Hero Interrupt: When a player reveals a facedown encounter card, discard it → search the encounter discard pile for another card of the same type. Reveal that card instead. "I gave them everything." —Druig

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Interrupt (attack/thwart): When an enemy would activate against you, discard Eternal Foresight → cancel that activation. Deal 4 damage to that enemy or remove 3 threat from a scheme.

card.name: Heed the Call
card.property: Hero Action: Ready your hero. Hero Action: Choose one of the following traits: [[ATTACK]], [[DEFENSE]], [[THWART]], or [[WEAPON]]. Discard cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a card with the chosen trait → add that card to your hand. Reduce the cost of the next card played with the chosen trait this turn by 1.

card.name: The Three Principles
card.property: Response: After your hero defends against an attack, defeats an enemy, or defeats a scheme, place 1 duty counter here (to a maximum of 3). Hero Resource: Exhaust The Three Principles and remove any number of duty counters here → generate that many [star] resources.

card.name: Path of the Priestess
card.property: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme. If you paid for this card using a [wild] resource, heal 1 damage from a friendly character and give them a tough status card. "Perhaps this too is a test." —Ajak

card.name: Deific Touch
card.property: Ajak gets +1 THW and +1 DEF. Hero Response: After you pay for a card using a [wild] resource, exhaust Deific Touch → give an immortal ally a tough status card. If you spent [wild] [wild] resources, you may give any friendly character a tough status card, instead.

card.name: Druig
card.property: Ulterior Motives — Response: When a side scheme is defeated, place 1 domination counter here (to a maximum of 3). Interrupt (defense): When a non-elite minion attacks, exhaust Druig, remove 1 domination counter from him, and choose another enemy → damage from that attack is dealt to the chosen enemy instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Interrupt (attack): When the villain activates against you, cancel that activation and deal 1 damage to the villain for each player side scheme in the victory display. If a Druig player side scheme is in the victory display, this attack deals 3 additional damage.

card.name: Byzantine Machinations
card.property: Victory 0. While Byzantine Machinations is in the victory display, Druig gets +1 DEF. While Byzantine Machinations is in the victory display, Druig gains the text: "Action: Remove 1 domination counter from Druig → Choose a minion. That minion attacks an enemy of your choice. (Limit once per round.)"

card.name: Snakelike Cunning
card.property: Victory 0. While Snakelike Cunning is in the victory display, Druig gets +1 THW. When Defeated: Cancel the villain's next activation against each player. "Sometimes a snake needs to let its venom out." —The Machine

card.property: Hero Action: Ready your hero and give them a tough status card. "Thena's love is not soft. It has a sharp edge when it needs one. The love cuts until there is nothing else... Before the end, Tzaigo realizes what a fearful thing Thena's love is... but it is still love." —The Machine

card.name: Eternal Physiology
card.property: Your identity gains steady. Response: After Eternal Physiology enters play, choose a basic power. Your hero gets +1 to the chosen power (while Eternal Physiology is in your play area).

card.name: Heed the Call
card.property: Hero Action: Ready your hero. Hero Action: Choose one of the following traits: [[ATTACK]], [[DEFENSE]], [[THWART]], or [[WEAPON]]. Discard cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a card with the chosen trait → add that card to your hand. Reduce the cost of the next card played with the chosen trait this turn by 1.

card.name: The Three Principles
card.property: Response: After your hero defends against an attack, defeats an enemy, or defeats a scheme, place 1 duty counter here (to a maximum of 3). Hero Resource: Exhaust The Three Principles and remove any number of duty counters here → generate that many [star] resources.

card.name: Transformed Halberd
card.property: Restricted. Hero Response (thwart): After your hero attacks and defeats an enemy, exhaust Transformed Halberd → remove 2 threat from a scheme.

card.name: Transformed Spear
card.property: Restricted. Hero Response (attack): After your hero defends against an enemy attack, exhaust Transformed Spear → deal 3 damage to an enemy. "This will save lives." —Thena

card.name: Transformed Sword
card.property: Restricted. Hero Response: After your hero attacks and defeats an enemy, exhaust Transformed Sword → ready your hero or draw 1 card. "She is the book and the blade." —The Machine

card.name: Eros
card.property: Basic Instincts — Action: Spend [mental][mental] resources → place 1 energy counter here. (Limit once per round.) Interrupt: When Eros thwarts, remove 1 energy counter here → confuse a minion. You may remove 1 additional energy counter to confuse the villain, instead.

alternate.name: The Uni-Mind
alternate.property: This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. X is equal to the printed HP value of your set-aside hero. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, put your set-aside hero card into play, hero side-face up. Flip this card and attach it to your hero, moving all counters on this card or cards attached to this card to your hero.

card.name: Connection to the Uni-Mind
card.property: Permanent. Setup. This card's printed text box cannot be treated as if it were blank. Forced Interrupt: When you would change forms, move all counters on your hero or cards attached to your hero to this card. Set your hero aside, out of play, and flip this card over.

card.name: Lives of Eons
card.property: Action: Choose one: • Search your deck and discard pile for an identity specific card and play it (paying all costs). (Shuffle.) • Shuffle up to 3 identity specific cards from your discard pile into your deck.

card.name: The Exclusion
card.property: Increase your ally limit by 1. Response: After your turn begins, heal 1 damage from a defeated [[ETERNAL]] ally. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust The Exclusion → heal 1 damage from an [[ETERNAL]] ally (even if they are defeated).

card.name: Guard the Machine
card.property: Attach to a non-defeated [[ETERNAL]] ally you control. Attached ally loses the immortal keyword and gets +1 ATK, THW, and hit point. Response: After Guard the Machine enters play, heal all damage from attached ally. Forced Interrupt: When attached ally would be defeated, discard this card.

card.name: Skills of the Ancients
card.property: Each [[ETERNAL]] character you control gains the [[AERIAL]] and [[PSIONIC]] traits. Hero Action: Exhaust Skills of the Ancients → give an [[ETERNAL]] ally you control +1 ATK or +1 THW until the end of the round.

card.name: Puppet Master
card.property: Hero Interrupt: When a player reveals a facedown encounter card, discard it → search the encounter discard pile for another card of the same type. Reveal that card instead. "I gave them everything." —Druig

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Interrupt (attack/thwart): When an enemy would activate against you, discard Eternal Foresight → cancel that activation. Deal 4 damage to that enemy or remove 3 threat from a scheme.

card.name: Biocosmic Blast
card.property: Hero Action (attack): Deal 5 damage to an enemy. You may place 1 energy counter on your identity, if able. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme and confuse an enemy.

card.name: Eternal Ingenuity
card.property: Hero Response: After you place any amount of energy counters on your identity, place 1 ingenuity counter here. Hero Interrupt: When you attack an enemy, exhaust Eternal Ingenuity and remove 2 ingenuity counters here → stun or confuse that enemy.

card.name: Warriors in Arms
card.property: Hero Response: After you spend this card, heal 1 damage from an [[ETERNAL]] ally (even if they are defeated). "We Eternals are not a team. We are a society." —Sersi

card.name: Self-Sacrifice
card.property: Response: After an [[ETERNAL]] ally is defeated, discard Self-Sacrifice → search your deck or discard pile for an identity-specific card and add it to your hand. "A hero saves, and a hero sacrifices." —The Machine

card.name: Stellar Shot
card.property: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy and confuse it. If that enemy was already confused, this attack deals 6 damage and gains overkill instead. "Is it a relaxing drink or saving the world first?" —Eros

card.name: The Starfox
card.property: Eros gains the [[AVENGER]] trait. Hero Response: When you deal damage to a confused enemy, that attack deals +1 damage. Hero Action: Discard a confused status card from an enemy and exhaust The Starfox → ready Eros and draw 1 card.

card.name: Jack of Knives
card.property: [star] Subtle Blades — Jack of Knives' THW and ATK are equal to the highest number of boost icons ([boost]) on an encounter card in play, to a minimum of 1. "I'm not joining you. This is a job."

card.name: Fortify Power
card.property: Hero Action: Exhaust 2 Eternal characters you control → change to your alter-ego. Draw up to your maximum printed hand size. You get +2 REC until the end of the round. "I ask for the approval of the Uni-Mind." —Druig

card.name: Ruthless Vision
card.property: Hero Action: Exhaust Ruthless Vision and deal 1 damage to an Eternal character you control → draw 1 card. "Do not play so lightly with your souls, friends." —Phastos

card.name: The Hall of Blades
card.property: Cards attached here count for Jack of Knives' "Subtle Blades" ability, but are not in play. Forced Interrupt: When you would discard a treachery after resolving it, discard 1 random card attached here, if able. Then, attach the resolved treachery here instead of discarding it.

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Interrupt: When you defeat an enemy or a side scheme, discard Assassin's Quarry → remove threat from a scheme equal to the number of boost icons ([boost]) on the defeated card, or attach it to Hall of Blades instead of discarding it. Ready Jack of Blades.

card.property: Response: When your turn begins, place 1 energy counter here (to a maximum of 6). Interrupt: When you attack an enemy, remove any number of energy counters here → that attack deals +1 damage to that enemy for each energy counter removed this way.

card.name: Fatal Slice
card.property: Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Kingo → deal 9 damage to an enemy. This attack gains overkill. Place 1 energy counter on Kingo (to a maximum of 6) for each [physical] resource spent to play this card. "Death to he whom death loathes!" —Kingo

card.name: Riposte
card.property: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy. This attack gains piercing. Draw 1 card or place 2 energy counters on Kingo (to a maximum of 6). "Kingo! He is a smiling mask. Amusing, but who truly knows what—if anything—lies beneath?" —The Machine

card.name: Ajak
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Path of the Priestess). [star] Interrupt: When Ajak thwarts, heal 1 damage from another friendly [[ETERNAL]] character.

card.name: Druig
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Snakelike Cunning). Response: After a player side scheme is defeated, exhaust Druig and deal him 1 damage → draw 1 card. Draw 1 additional card if there are 3 or more player side schemes in the victory display.

card.name: Eros
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Stellar Shot). [star] Response: After Eros attacks and damages an enemy, spend [mental][mental][mental] or [wild][wild] resources → confuse that enemy. (Limit once per round.)

card.name: Gilgamesh
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Gigaton Blow). Hero Action: Exhaust Gilgamesh and spend [physical][physical] resources → ready an [[ETERNAL]] character.

card.name: Ikaris
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Concentrated Beams). [star] Ikaris' basic attacks gain ranged. "Call me when I am required."

card.name: Jack of Knives
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Assassin's Quarry). [star] Jack of Knives' THW and ATK are equal to the highest number of boost icons ([boost]) on an encounter card in play, to a minimum of 1.

card.name: Kingo
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Riposte). Response: When your turn begins, place 1 energy counter here (to a maximum of 6). Interrupt: When Kingo attacks, remove 3 charge counters from Kingo → he gets +1 ATK for this attack.

card.name: Makkari
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Thousand Strikes). Response: After Makkari readies during your turn → heal 1 damage from her. (Limit thrice per round.)

card.name: Phastos
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Technoforge). [star] Response: After Phastos attacks, play an upgrade from your hand, reducing its cost by 1.

card.name: Sersi
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Matter Manipulation). Resource: When you generate a [star] resource, exhaust Sersi and deal 1 damage to her → generate an additional [star] resource.

card.name: Sprite
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Illusion Casting). Interrupt: When Sprite thwarts, discard the top card of the encounter deck. If that card has a star icon ([star]) in its boost area, Sprite takes no consequential damage for this thwart.

card.name: Thena
card.property: Immortal. Setup. Signature (Transformed Halberd, Transformed Spear, or Tranformed Sword). Action: Exhaust Thena → ready a restricted upgrade.

card.name: Path of the Priestess
card.property: Hero Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme. If you paid for this card using a [wild] resource, heal 1 damage from a friendly character and give them a tough status card. "Perhaps this too is a test." —Ajak

card.name: Snakelike Cunning
card.property: Victory 0. While Snakelike Cunning is in the victory display, Druig gets +1 THW. When Defeated: Cancel the villain's next activation against each player. "Sometimes a snake needs to let its venom out." —The Machine

card.name: Stellar Shot
card.property: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy and confuse it. If that enemy was already confused, this attack deals 6 damage and gains overkill instead. "Is it a relaxing drink or saving the world first?" —Eros

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Action (attack): Exhaust Gilgamesh → deal 10 damage to an enemy. This attack gains overkill. This attack does 1 additional damage for each [physical] resource spent to pay for this card (to a maximum of 3).

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Action (attack): Deal damage to an enemy equal to your ATK. This attack gains ranged and piercing. If this attack defeats an enemy, ready your hero and heal 1 damage from them.

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Interrupt: When you defeat an enemy or a side scheme, discard Assassin's Quarry → remove threat from a scheme equal to the number of boost icons ([boost]) on the defeated card, or attach it to Hall of Blades instead of discarding it. Ready Jack of Blades.

card.name: Riposte
card.property: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to an enemy. This attack gains piercing. Draw 1 card or place 2 energy counters on Kingo (to a maximum of 6). "Kingo! He is a smiling mask. Amusing, but who truly knows what—if anything—lies beneath?" —The Machine

card.name: Thousand Strikes
card.property: Hero Action: Ready Makkari and make a basic attack or basic thwart with her. Ready Makkari and make a basic attack or basic thwart with her (exhausting her). "On this day I run, I race..." —Makkari

card.name: Technoforge
card.property: Hero Action: Exhaust Phastos and discard an upgrade you control → play an upgrade from your hand or discard pile, reducing its cost by the cost of the discarded upgrade. "'Working too hard' is his power." —Thena

property.name: Text
property.value: Interrupt: When you spend this card, exhaust Sersi or two other Eternal characters you control → this card generates an additional [wild] [wild].

property.name: Text
property.value: Hero Interrupt (attack/thwart): When a boost card is turned faceup, discard Illusion Casting → cancel that card's "Boost" ability and all of its boost icons ([boost]), then discard it. Deal X damage to an enemy or remove X threat from a scheme, where X is equal to the amount of boost icons canceled.

card.name: Transformed Halberd
card.property: Restricted. Hero Response (thwart): After your hero attacks and defeats an enemy, exhaust Transformed Halberd → remove 2 threat from a scheme.

card.name: Transformed Spear
card.property: Restricted. Hero Response (attack): After your hero defends against an enemy attack, exhaust Transformed Spear → deal 3 damage to an enemy. "This will save lives." —Thena

card.name: Transformed Sword
card.property: Restricted. Hero Response: After your hero attacks and defeats an enemy, exhaust Transformed Sword → ready your hero or draw 1 card. "She is the book and the blade." —The Machine

card.name: The Prime Eternal
card.property: Each [[Eternal]] character you control gets +1 hit point. Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust an [[Eternal]] character → draw 1 card. (Limit twice per round.) Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust 3 [[Eternal]] characters → take control of The Prime Eternal. Any player may activate this ability.

card.name: Never Die, Never Win
card.property:
Give to a Uni-Mind player. Defeat an [[Eternal]] ally you control and take 3 indirect damage. Discard this card.
[star] Boost: Deal 2 damage to a friendly [[Eternal]] character.

card.name: Family Feud
card.property: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When an ally suffers consequential damage, they take 1 additional consequential damage.

card.name: Heel Turn
card.property: Treat attached ally as a minion with a blank text box. Attached minion's SCH is equal to its printed THW, it gains the villainous keyword, and does not take consequential damage. When Revealed: Attach to an undefeated immortal ally without Heel Turn attached and heal all damage from it. Attached ally engages its controller. (The Uni-Mind's nemesis minion.)

card.name: Savage Immortals
card.property:
Forced Interrupt: Savage Immortals' attacks deal indirect damage. This damage must be assigned first to allies you control, if able.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

property.value: When Revealed: A minion with Heel Turn attached activates against you, if able. Otherwise, search the encounter deck and discard pile for Heel Turn and reveal it. Give a minion with Heel Turn attached a tough status card.

property.value: When Revealed: A minion with Heel Turn attached activates against you, if able. Otherwise, search the encounter deck and discard pile for Heel Turn and reveal it. Give a minion with Heel Turn attached a tough status card.

card.name: Never Die, Never Win
card.property:
Give to a Uni-Mind player. Defeat an [[Eternal]] ally you control and take 3 indirect damage. Discard this card.
[star] Boost: Deal 2 damage to a friendly [[Eternal]] character.

card.name: Family Feud
card.property: Hinder 2[per_hero]. Forced Interrupt: When an ally suffers consequential damage, they take 1 additional consequential damage.

card.name: Heel Turn
card.property: Treat attached ally as a minion with a blank text box. Attached minion's SCH is equal to its printed THW, it gains the villainous keyword, and does not take consequential damage. When Revealed: Attach to an undefeated immortal ally without Heel Turn attached and heal all damage from it. Attached ally engages its controller. (The Uni-Mind's nemesis minion.)
